expectations.evidence: PM 하위영역 20개 이상 나열: strategy, discovery, roadmap, prioritization, PRD, stakeholder mgmt, agile, sprint, A/B testing, competitive analysis, pricing, tech debt, JTBD 등
'transitioning from engineering background', 'reframe technical thinking into product thinking', 'influence without authority', 'leverage technical depth as asset rather than crutch'
'top-tier expert who has spent 20+ years in this domain'와 'Curse of Knowledge' 원문 보존
